rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to component ports, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; syntax for all AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE contracts.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicit typed ports or constants are available.
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes for assignments.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Compute_Execution_Time as AGREE variables.
Do not use subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts without valid variable representations.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing tokens
Model fusion and scope preservation rules
